channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jazz drop eighth straight with 138-113 loss to Minnesota
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Anthony Edwards scored 16 of his 36 points in the third quarter and the Minnesota Timberwolves routed the Utah 138-113 on Thursday for their fifth straight victory and second in two nights.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Declan Doyle: The 28-year-old COO of Ben Johnson's offense
item.description: Declan Doyle, a 28-year-old Iowan, is the new offensive coordinator for the Chicago Bears, tasked with creating buy-in and being the COO of Ben Johnson's offense.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bronny James plays the whole 4th quarter -- with plenty of ups and downs -- in Lakers' blowout win
item.description: Bronny James scored a career-high five points while playing the whole fourth quarter in the Los Angeles Lakers' 134-96 win at Washington.
item.dc:creator: Noah Trister, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: McIlroy and Lowry come up aces, Scheffler back with a 67 and Henley takes Pebble Beach lead
item.description: Scottie Scheffler looked every bit like the No. 1 player in the world even if he didn't make a hole-in-one during the exciting start to the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am.
item.dc:creator: Doug Ferguson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Local pro bull rider representing Navajo Nation
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Pro Bull Riders Tour is coming back to Salt Lake City next weekend for the Unleash the Beats event at the Delta Center. At this level, the relationship between bull rider and bull has to be in sync, like a wild dance.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New Raiders coach Pete Carroll retains defensive coordinator Patrick Graham, AP source says
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Las Vegas Raiders coach Pete Carroll has retained defensive coordinator Patrick Graham, a person familiar with the decision said Thursday. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because the team didn't announce the move.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Max Scherzer agrees to a $15.5 million, 1-year contract with the Toronto Blue Jays, AP source says
item.description: Max Scherzer is joining the Toronto Blue Jays, agreeing to a 15.5 million, one-year contract on Thursday, according to a person with direct knowledge of the deal. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the agreement had not been announced and was pending a physical.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A Lim Kim opens 4-shot lead in 1st round of LPGA season opener
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — A Lim Kim shot a bogey-free, 7-under 65 on Thursday to take a four-shot lead in the opening round of the Hilton Grand Vacations Tournament of Champions, the LGPA Tour season opener. The 29-year-old Kim, a two-time winner on tour including the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ravens' Justin Tucker faces sexual misconduct allegations; kicker slams report
item.description: A bombshell report has accused veteran NFL player Justin Tucker of sexual misconduct, allegations the Baltimore Ravens star denied as "unequivocally false.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles are the new America's Team going into the Super Bowl against the Chiefs
item.description: Move over, Dallas Cowboys. There’s a new and unlikely America’s Team in the NFL — at least for the Super Bowl. The Philadelphia Eagles have become the popular choice among many football fans who want to see the Kansas City Chiefs lose for various reasons.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose business leader seeks max benefits for mega sports events
item.description: A top South Bay business leader is seeking a game plan so San Jose can score economic benefits from upcoming sports mega-events.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Plane crashes in sports have devastated pro teams and college programs
item.description: The crash of an American Airlines jet that collided with an Army helicopter was the latest to strike the sports world in the U.S. and globally. Among the passengers were several members of the Skating Club of Boston who were returning from the U.S. Figure Skating Championships in Wichita, Kansas.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU outlasts Baylor in overtime, 93-89
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a perfect night for one BYU freshman, and a perfect ending for BYU Tuesday night against Baylor.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC ends road trip with 3-1 loss at Ottawa
item.description: OTTAWA (ABC4 Sports) - Leevi Merilainen made 34 saves, and the Ottawa Senators won 3-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Canadian Tire Centre on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — On the same evening the Chicago Bears are reportedly hiring their next defensive coordinator, the Bears have also committed to a new offensive coordinator under first-year head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Penske's pair of Porsches dominate as The Captain wins Rolex 24 at Daytona for 2nd consecutive year
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Roger Penske started his 59th season in motorsports the same way he closed last year — as a champion.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Padres announce 2025 theme game schedule and giveaways
item.description: The San Diego Padres have unveiled their 2025 promotional schedule, featuring a variety of exciting giveaways, theme games and fan events throughout the season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5
